offerIntroVariants: Reports keep coming in about {targetNamePlural} beyond the gates.
The roads are growing dangerous with so many {targetNamePlural} nearby.
Scouts have spotted {targetNamePlural} massing close to town.
offerDetailVariants: Hunt down {count} {targetNamePlural} and make the approach to town safer.
Bring me proof that {count} {targetNamePlural} have been dealt with.
Take care of {count} {targetNamePlural} before they reach the walls.
acceptVariants: Good. Return to me after you've slain {count} {targetNamePlural}.
Excellent. Deal with those {targetNamePlural} and report back when you're done.
That's what I needed to hear. Hunt them down, then return here.
inProgressVariants: You still have {count} {targetNamePlural} to deal with.
The town won't rest easy until those {targetNamePlural} are gone.
Stay focused. Those {targetNamePlural} are still out there.
completeVariants: Well done. The townsfolk will breathe easier with those {targetNamePlural} gone.
Excellent work. You've thinned their numbers considerably.
That's one less threat pressing against our walls.

offerIntroVariants: We've lost contact with a lookout near the {regionName}.
Something feels wrong out by the {regionName}.
offerDetailVariants: Travel to the marked location at ({targetX}, {targetY}) and see what you find.
Head for ({targetX}, {targetY}) and report back once you've looked the area over.
Make your way to ({targetX}, {targetY}) and give the area a proper scout.
acceptVariants: Stay sharp. Return to me after you've visited ({targetX}, {targetY}).
Good. Check the area and report back to me once you've been there.
Perfect. Scout the location and return with what you've learned.
inProgressVariants: The {regionName} still needs to be checked.
You haven't reached the scouting point yet.
Travel to ({targetX}, {targetY}) before you report back.
completeVariants: Good work. Fresh eyes out there are always valuable.
Excellent. That reconnaissance helps more than you know.
You've done the town a service by scouting that route.
